title: docs: fix typos and standardize "UT" to "UTC" in documentation
body:
### Description

1. RELEASE.md:
Fixed "abbrieviated" → "abbreviated"

2. ISSUE.md:
- Fixed "repoducer" → "reproducer" (2 instances)

- Standardized "UT" → "UTC" for consistency with technical documentation conventions；Using "UTC" (Coordinated Universal Time) is the standard practice in technical documentation, providing clearer communication

fixes #27851

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
